title: Support - Device - No Devices Connected screen
scenario: Verify the "No Devices Connected" screen displays the correct Poly Support message when accessing Support > Device from the menu.
steps: Open Lens App with "No Devices Connected" screen.
Tap Menu (hamburger icon) in upper left corner.
expected: Poly Support screen is visible with the message: "No previously connected devices were found. Please connect devices using the mobile device's Bluetooth Settings prior to requesting device support." Image reference per Figma.
